heading: Common Triggers
body:
Exceeding the connection limit for an Atlas cluster may occur for
a number of reasons. Different Atlas tiers have different
[Connection Limits and Cluster Tier](connection-limits).

For example, Free clusters (formerly known as `M0`) and Flex clusters are limited to 500 connections.
`M10` clusters are limited to 1500 connections. Larger cluster tiers have
higher connection limits.

Different database access applications have different ways of implementing
[connection pooling](manual/reference/connection-string),
which affects how many open connections your application maintains at any given time.
